title: Remove 12 unused production dependencies
description: Remove these deps (none are imported in src/): @anthropic-ai/sdk, @smithery/sdk, @valibot/to-json-schema, @xmldom/xmldom, chalk, minimatch, node-fetch, node-record-lpcm16, openai, sury, valibot, yaml. After removal, run `bun install` to verify the lockfile regenerates cleanly.
validation: Read package.json, confirm 12 deps removed. Run `grep -r "@anthropic-ai\|@smithery\|chalk\|minimatch\|node-fetch\|node-record-lpcm16\|sury\|valibot\|@xmldom\|openai" src/__tests__ src/` to confirm no remaining imports. Run `bun install` and confirm success.
